full_text:
Sun Ben (Boyang) 孫賁 (伯陽)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Sun Ben (孫賁), styledBoyang (伯陽), was born in Fu Chun county, Wu territory. Inherited Sun Jian’s troops and served Yuan Shu, then Sun Ce. Died of illness after Chibi. Sun Ben was affiliated with Yuan Shu and the Wu Kingdom. Sun Ben lived during the Later Han Dynasty and Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
